validatedClaims: ASCII QQ音乐 playback is validated through OCR-anchor activation and evidence-image verification.
The anchor-based narrow skill is validated across multiple visible ASCII rows on the aa result page.
boundaryClaims: Chinese OCR anchor playback is still a candidate boundary.
This member does not prove pointer-free activation or generalized playback for arbitrary queries.

validatedClaims: The row-fallback activation path is validated on the ASCII aa result page.
The row-fallback activation path is validated on the Chinese 周杰伦 result page.
boundaryClaims: Chinese row fallback does not yet prove requested-title semantic selection.
The current Chinese validated row case verifies the observed playback title 天空仍灿烂, not the requested title 晴天.

validatedClaims: Notes marker insertion and AX text verification are validated on macOS.
boundaryClaims: This member is a native text sample, not a music-selection skill.

validatedClaims: TextEdit marker insertion and AX text verification are validated on macOS.
boundaryClaims: This member is a native text sample, not a music-selection skill.

expectedSignals: The bundle lists two QQ音乐 narrow skills and two native text samples.
Member-level coverage summaries distinguish validated activation from unresolved semantic selection.
The bundle keeps QQ音乐 playback verification separate from generic AX text verification.
The bundle is inspectable through the CLI.
successCriteria: The bundle can be listed and shown through the CLI.
The validated sample set is preserved without rewriting target titles or broadening scope.
nonGoals: This bundle does not claim generalized cross-app distillation.
This bundle does not claim universal AX coverage.
This bundle does not collapse native text verification into QQ音乐 playback.

knownLimits: This is the first bundle-shaped artifact, not the final schema.
The bundle intentionally stays shallow and app-centered.
Target application version compatibility is still unresolved.
